log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Shifter — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Shifter — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
--- Shifter — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Shifter — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
